title: Sakura Cardcaptor Beds
description: This pack will add visual to the beds covers with Sakura's outfits
body:
Should work with any version of minecraft, ignore the warning message if the pack show red in the list.

This pack will add visual to the beds covers with Sakura's cardcaptor characters/outfits

Also on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/sakura-cardcaptor-beds) :)

![Bed preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/07fc0fc2d56a26f6764c9ea1ab59c33bebf48344.png)
